title: Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or other countries where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip are restricted, you face a daunting task: selling digital products without a functioning payment infrastructure. Your customers are eager, but there's no way to collect payment. This post explores alternatives, including a game-changing infrastructure designed to circumvent these restrictions, ensure instant automated delivery, and keep a significant portion of your earnings. We'll examine the actual capabilities of each option, focusing on their strengths and weaknesses.
What Each Option Actually Offers

The most significant difference between options is their purpose. PayPal and Stripe are payment processors that charge fees and offer various features, but they're inaccessible in restricted countries. Gumroad and Payhip are platforms that facilitate sales, but they also have restrictions. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is a comprehensive infrastructure solution, including the Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, designed to handle everything from payment verification to automated delivery. It's a permanent, structural alternative to payment processors and platforms that exclude certain countries.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip's restrictions are a result of their business models, which require users to comply with strict Know-Your-Customer (KYC) and Anti-Money-Laundering (AML) regulations. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's infrastructure is designed to accommodate creators in restricted countries, providing a way to accept payments without the need for a traditional payment processor account. This is made possible through the use of NOWPayments, which supports 300+ coins and has no KYC requirements. As a result, creators can focus on selling their digital products without worrying about compliance issues.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed and fees are critical considerations for creators. PayPal and Stripe charge high fees, often ranging from 2.9% + 30¢ per transaction. Gumroad and Payhip also charge fees, but they're generally lower. Unchained Commerce's infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a flat fee of $79.99 for the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to sell digital products. This means you can keep a larger portion of your earnings and focus on growing your business.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is a permanent structural alternative to payment processors and platforms that exclude restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key to a seamless sales experience. Unchained Commerce's infrastructure offers instant automated delivery, which eliminates the need for manual intervention. This means your customers receive their digital products immediately after payment, ensuring a positive experience. In contrast, PayPal and Stripe require manual verification, which can lead to delays and frustration. Gumroad and Payhip also have limitations when it comes to automation, making Unchained Commerce's infrastructure a more reliable choice.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
By choosing Unchained Commerce, you can keep a larger portion of your earnings and focus on growing your business without worrying about compliance issues.

Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
Unchained Commerce's infrastructure offers instant automated delivery, ensuring a seamless sales experience for your customers and a positive experience for your business.
